title: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign
snippet: Adobe is updating its Firefly AI assistant with new chops, and adding it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Frame.io.

title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
snippet: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).
